title: cyclosorus verruculosus
intro: Cyclosorus verruculosus, also known as the rough-scaled polypody, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus verruculosus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce menstrual cramps. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in infusions or powder forms.
